items.title: Investment Manager , Acumen India
items.description:
Acumen is seeking an Investment Manager with at least 8 years of work experience wherein minimum 4 years of investment experience in venture capital, private equity, investment banking, or investment management is required.

About Acumen

items.title: Manager/Senior Associate
items.description: Please note that we are not actively recruiting for this role at the moment. However, if you choose to submit your application, your profile will be included in our pipeline for this position should an opening arise. If your profile aligns well with the requirements once a vacancy becomes available, we will reach out to you directly.

items.description:
About One Acre Fund

Founded in 2006, One Acre Fund equips 5.5 million smallholder farmers to make their farms more productive. Across nine countries that together are home to two-thirds of Africa's farmers, we provide high-quality farm supplies, tree seedlings, accessible credit, modern agronomic training, and a wide range of other agricultural services. Description de l’organisation

Fondée en 2006, One Acre Fund aide 5,5 millions de petits exploitants agricoles à accroître la productivité de leurs exploitations. Présents dans neuf pays qui regroupent les deux tiers des agriculteurs africains, nous fournissons des produits agricoles de qualité, des plants d'arbres, des crédits accessibles, des formations agricoles modernes et une large gamme d'autres services agricoles.
